message:
🌱 jaeger: Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of various metrics? (#1149)

* 🌱 Add jaeger: Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct jaeger namespace to observability

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-1224-is-there-a-document-to-explain-the-specific-meaning-of-various-metri",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of various metrics?",
+    "description": "Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of various metrics?. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current jaeger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your jaeger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nhelm list -n observability 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working jaeger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\nSupporting prometheus metrcis is a good thing for me ,but i find it is difficult to totally understand the real meaning of the metrics exposed by jaeger-agent,jaeger-collector and jaeger-query."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of…",
+        "description": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- Resolves #1224.\n\n## Short description of the changes\n- Golang script to parse metric tags and write a GitHub-flavored markdown table with app (e.g. agent, collector, ingester, etc.), metric name, metric tags, and description.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Is there a document to explain the specific meaning of…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- Resolves #1224.\n\n## Short description of the changes\n- Golang script to parse metric tags and write a GitHub-flavored markdown table with app (e.g. agent, collector, ingester, etc.), metric name, metric tags, and description.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
